candidate.title: The neural dynamics of working memory and transcranial magnetic stimulation

sources.text:
OpenNeuro dataset ds008037 (snapshot 1.0.0)
Name: The neural dynamics of working memory and transcranial magnetic stimulation
Authors: Mana Biabani, Nigel C. Rogasch
License: CC0
DatasetDOI: doi:10.18112/openneuro.ds008037.v1.0.0
Number of subjects: 123
Modalities: eeg, beh
Tasks: TMS-EEG, Working memory, Resting state, smt, opn, sym, SymbolSearch, CLT, ort, BackwardsDigitSpan, StopSignal, Go/No-Go
Sessions: 
Total files: 7786
Size bytes: 105318399253
Created: 2026-06-26T01:54:51.365Z

README:
The dataset includes de-identified resting-state EEG recordings (rest), working-memory EEG and behavioural data (workingmemory), TMS-EEG recordings (tmseeg) from four stimulation sites including prefrontal cortex, premotor cortex, parietal cortex, and shoulder as a control condition, as well as behavioural data from a multi-task cognitive battery comprising the bar (bar), backwards digit span (bds), colour (clt), go/no-go (gng), n-back (nback), operation span (opn), orientation (ort), symbol search (sbs), stop-signal (sst), and symmetry span (sym) tasks. Structural MRI data were collected as part of the broader study but are not included in this OpenNeuro release.
